column1:
"We'll be travelling round Europe next month" said Jerry.

Jerry said that___________________be travelling round Europe. (FOLLOWING)

"I had Evan and Christie over for dinner last night" said Liz
Liz said that___________________had Evan and Christie over for dinner. (BEFORE)

"Daz came here two days ago and then suddenly left" said Barry.

Barry said that Daz had_______________and then suddenly left. (GONE)

"We're going on our yearly diet tomorrow" said Jessie and Sandy together. 

Jessie and Sandy said together that_______________yearly diet next day. (STARTING)

"I can pick you two boys up from school this afternoon," said their father to George and Kevin.

George and Kevin's father told his sons_____________________up from school that afternoon. (THAT)

"I'll buy these as they're so cheap!" said Toby.

Toby said he_________________as they were so cheap. (GOING)

"You must study harder, Dave" said Dave's mum.

Dave's mum________________study harder. (HIM)

"I think you may be coming doen with flu" Greg said to me.

Greg said that________________be coming down with flu. (THOUGHT)

"I don't know why they haven't contacted me recently" said Tine.

Tine said she didn't know why___________________recently. (BEEN)

"Everything was different yesterday" said Ben.

Ben said everything__________________before. (BEEN)
